opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It's my husband — he has been urinating non-stop for days, vomiting everything up, and now he can barely speak or move his arms. I can hardly wake him.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He has gone downhill fast tonight — he was drinking huge amounts of water for days, then couldn't stop being sick, and now he is so weak and drowsy he can't get out of bed or talk properly.

symptom_narrative.onset: the excessive urinating and thirst started about 3 days ago; the vomiting came on in the last day; the weakness and drowsiness got much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.character: non-stop urinating and constant thirst, then repeated vomiting and no appetite, and now floppy weakness in the arms and legs and going in and out of making sense
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst he's ever been — he can't move himself and I can barely rouse him
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — his whole body feels weak and floppy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse over the days, much worse in the last few hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse no matter what
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: he keeps saying his heart is racing and skipping, he hasn't opened his bowels in about four days, and he's been vomiting so much he can't keep anything down
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely bedbound since yesterday afternoon, cannot stand, feed himself or speak clearly

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, takes a water tablet for it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a water tablet for blood pressure
calcium supplement tablets bought from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: older man living at home with his spouse, who is present and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: he is very drowsy and hard to wake, and when he does speak he is confused and not making sense
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's description over the phone, not a formal conscious-state assessment

objective_data_offered.value: his arms and legs have gone floppy and weak — he can't lift them or hold anything
he keeps vomiting and can't keep any food or water down
his lips and mouth look really dry
there are several empty water jugs next to the bed from all the drinking over the last few days
he says his heart keeps racing and skipping
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own sensation, no device reading; he is confused so the report may be unreliable
